mapper.select: select id, role_code, role_name, status, created_at, updated_at from sys_role order by id
mapper.insert: insert into sys_role (role_code, role_name, status) values (#{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{status})
mapper.select: select id, permission_code, permission_name, resource_type, path, status, created_at, updated_at from sys_permission order by id

SELECT id, permission_code, permission_name, resource_type, path, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_permission
AND permission_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{permissionCode}, '%')
AND permission_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{permissionName}, '%')
AND resource_type = #{resourceType}
AND status = #{status}
AND path LIKE CONCAT('%', #{path}, '%')
ORDER BY id
SELECT user_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_permission (permission_code, permission_name, resource_type, path, status) values (#{permissionCode}, #{permissionName}, #{resourceType}, #{path}, #{status})
mapper.update: update sys_permission set permission_code = #{permissionCode}, permission_name = #{permissionName}, resource_type = #{resourceType}, path = #{path}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
